name: Borzo On-Demand Urban Delivery API
what_it_does: Borzo on-demand urban delivery REST API for businesses to automate same-day and intraday courier dispatch across India, Southeast Asia (Indonesia, Philippines), Brazil, Czech Republic, and other markets — formerly known as WeFast/Dunzo for Business, Borzo provides motorcycle courier dispatch for restaurants, pharmacies, florists, retail, and e-commerce needing fast urban last-mile delivery. Enables AI agents to manage delivery order creation for courier dispatch automation, handle real-time tracking for delivery progress automation, access delivery quote for cost estimation automation, retrieve order status for delivery verification automation, manage cancellation for order reversal automation, handle proof of delivery for completion confirmation automation, access coverage check for serviceability validation automation, retrieve webhook for delivery event automation, manage scheduled delivery for future booking automation, and integrate Borzo with food delivery, pharmacy, retail, and e-commerce platforms for end-to-end urban same-day delivery automation.
use_cases: Dispatching same-day motorcycle couriers for urban restaurant and pharmacy delivery automation agents
Getting real-time delivery quotes for dynamic shipping cost calculation automation agents
Tracking courier location and delivery ETA for customer notification automation agents
Managing scheduled delivery pickups for retail and e-commerce fulfillment automation agents
not_for: Long-distance or intercity delivery (Borzo is urban same-day delivery within city limits)
Bulk pallet or freight shipping (Borzo is motorcycle/compact van courier for parcels)
Markets outside Borzo's operating cities (primarily India, Indonesia, Philippines, Brazil, Czech Republic)
best_when: A restaurant, pharmacy, retailer, or e-commerce business in India or Borzo's operating cities wanting AI agents to automate same-day urban courier dispatch, real-time tracking, and delivery management through Borzo's on-demand network.
avoid_when: DYNAMIC PRICING: Borzo courier pricing fluctuates based on demand, time of day, and distance; automated fixed-price assumption creates price mismatch at booking; automated must get fresh quote at booking time and handle price changes. DRIVER AVAILABILITY NOT GUARANTEED: Borzo cannot guarantee instant driver assignment at all times; automated always-available courier assumption creates assignment_delay on high-demand periods; automated must handle delayed assignment gracefully. CITY COVERAGE IS METRO-SPECIFIC: Borzo operates in specific metros, not all cities in operating countries; automated country-wide coverage assumption creates outside_coverage_area error; automated must check city-level serviceability before order. ORDER SIZE LIMITS APPLY: Borzo couriers use motorcycles with cargo constraints; automated large parcel assumption creates size_exceeded rejection; automated must validate parcel dimensions against Borzo's vehicle capacity limits.

auth.notes: Borzo uses API key (X-Token header) for authentication. REST API with JSON. Moscow origins, now operating globally. Founded 2012. Rebranded from WeFast (India) to Borzo (2022). Backed by multiple investors. Products: On-demand courier, scheduled delivery, batch orders, POD, live tracking. SDKs: None public. Operates in India (primary), Indonesia, Philippines, Brazil, Czech Republic, and others. 350,000+ courier partners. Competes with Lalamove and Pandago for urban on-demand delivery.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for registered business accounts; production charges per delivery
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-delivery pricing based on distance and demand; no monthly fee; wallet top-up model
pricing.notes: Global HQ. Per-delivery pricing. Wallet-based billing. Urban metro focus. India primary market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order creation throttled; webhooks for delivery lifecycle events

known_agent_gotchas: FRESH QUOTE REQUIRED BEFORE ORDER: Borzo delivery prices change dynamically; automated cached quote assumption creates price_changed at booking; automated must call calculate endpoint immediately before order creation

DRIVER ASSIGNMENT IS ASYNC: Borzo driver assignment after order creation takes variable time (30 seconds to several minutes); automated immediate driver ID expectation creates null driver data; automated must poll or use webhook for driver_assigned event

CITY-LEVEL COVERAGE CHECK: Borzo is metro-city focused; automated country-level serviceability assumption creates outside_zone error; automated must verify specific pickup and dropoff coordinates are within Borzo's service zone before order

WALLET BALANCE REQUIRED: Borzo uses prepaid wallet model for business accounts; automated credit-based payment assumption creates insufficient_balance error; automated must maintain wallet balance above delivery cost before creating orders

PARCEL SIZE LIMITS FOR MOTORCYCLE: Borzo couriers primarily use motorcycles with compact cargo capacity; automated large parcel booking creates payload_exceeds_limit; automated must validate parcel size and weight against motorcycle constraints
agent_readiness.security_notes: Urban courier. DPDP (India), PDP-ID. API key. IN/SEA. Delivery and location data.

security_score_components.security_notes: On-demand courier. DPDP, PDP-ID. API key. IN/SEA. Delivery and location data.
